data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites, and prefer your site to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Users can only keep 7 (plus or minus 2) items in their working memory.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive more aesthetically pleasing designs to be easier to use.
